title: Replace logo with newly uploaded image across all app locations

requirements.summary: Replace the current logo image in the Navigation component with the newly uploaded logo file, ensuring proper sizing and responsive behavior
acceptanceCriteria: The new logo image is saved as a static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated/
Navigation component references the new logo file and displays it correctly on both desktop and mobile
Logo is properly sized and does not overflow or appear distorted

file_operations.description: Save the edited logo image (re-rendered with warm brown tones and improved contrast) as a static asset in the generated assets directory. This is the edited version of Brown_Retro_Book_Store_Logo_20260224_152956_0000-removebg-preview.png with enhanced visibility on both light and dark backgrounds.

Update the logo image reference from /assets/generated/lit-heaven-logo-visible.dim_400x400.png to /assets/generated/lit-heaven-logo-new.dim_400x400.png. Verify proper sizing (appropriate width/height constraints) and ensure the logo displays correctly in both mobile menu and desktop navigation with proper responsive behavior.

requirements.summary: Update the favicon reference in frontend/index.html to use the newly uploaded logo image
acceptanceCriteria: The <link rel='icon'> in frontend/index.html points to the new logo asset path
The favicon displays the new logo in the browser tab

file_operations.description: Update the favicon <link rel='icon'> tag to reference /assets/generated/lit-heaven-logo-new.dim_400x400.png instead of the current logo path. Ensure the favicon displays correctly in browser tabs.

requirements.summary: Update the BooksPage hero banner to use the newly uploaded logo image wherever the previous logo was referenced
acceptanceCriteria: BooksPage hero banner displays the new logo image
Image renders correctly at all viewport sizes

file_operations.description: Update any logo image references in the hero banner section to use /assets/generated/lit-heaven-logo-new.dim_400x400.png. Ensure the logo renders correctly at all viewport sizes and maintains proper aspect ratio and positioning within the hero layout.

requirements.summary: Audit all other frontend components for references to the old logo and update each to use the newly uploaded logo image
acceptanceCriteria: No component references the old logo file lit-heaven-logo-visible.dim_400x400.png
All logo instances across the app consistently display the new uploaded logo

file_operations.description: Review Footer component for any references to lit-heaven-logo-visible.dim_400x400.png and update to /assets/generated/lit-heaven-logo-new.dim_400x400.png if logo usage is found. Ensure consistent logo display.

Review ProfileSetupModal component for any references to lit-heaven-logo-visible.dim_400x400.png and update to /assets/generated/lit-heaven-logo-new.dim_400x400.png if logo usage is found. Ensure the logo displays properly within the modal layout.

Review Layout component for any direct logo references (separate from Navigation component) to lit-heaven-logo-visible.dim_400x400.png and update to /assets/generated/lit-heaven-logo-new.dim_400x400.png if found.
